title: Definir schema Prisma — todas as entidades do modelo de dados
description: Criar o schema completo do Prisma com todos os modelos definidos no PRD: users, instructors, courses, modules, lessons, subscription_plans, user_subscriptions, course_enrollments, lesson_progress e certificates.
acceptanceCriteria: Todos os 10 modelos estão definidos no `schema.prisma`
Relacionamentos (foreign keys) estão corretamente definidos com `@relation`

Constraints de unicidade aplicados: `users.email`, `instructors.slug`, `courses.slug`, `user_subscriptions.stripe_subscription_id`, `course_enrollments(user_id, course_id)`, `lesson_progress(user_id, lesson_id)`, `certificates(user_id, course_id)`

steps.details: Adicionar em `prisma/schema.prisma`: `enum Role { admin instructor student }`, `enum PlanType { basic premium }`, `enum CourseStatus { draft published archived }`, `enum BillingCycle { monthly annual }`, `enum SubscriptionStatus { active past_due canceled trialing }`.

Criar model `User` com campos: `id String @id @default(uuid())`, `email String @unique`, `name String`, `passwordHash String`, `role Role @default(student)`, `avatarUrl String?`, `isActive Boolean @default(true)`, `createdAt DateTime @default(now())`, `updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt`. Adicionar relações com `Instructor`, `UserSubscription`, `CourseEnrollment`, `LessonProgress`, `Certificate`.

Criar models: `Instructor` (userId, bio, slug @unique), `Course` (id, title, slug @unique, description, thumbnailUrl, instructorId, planAccess PlanType, status CourseStatus @default(draft), createdAt, updatedAt), `Module` (id, courseId, title, description, order, createdAt), `Lesson` (id, moduleId, title, description, videoId, videoDuration, content, order, isPreview @default(false), createdAt, updatedAt).

Criar models: `SubscriptionPlan` (id, name, type PlanType @unique, description, priceMonthly, priceAnnual, stripePriceIdMonthly, stripePriceIdAnnual, isActive @default(true)), `UserSubscription` (id, userId, planId, stripeSubscriptionId @unique, stripeCustomerId, status SubscriptionStatus, billingCycle BillingCycle, currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd, createdAt, updatedAt).

steps.description: Definir modelos de progresso e certificado
steps.details: Criar models: `CourseEnrollment` (id, userId, courseId, enrolledAt @default(now()), completedAt?, @@unique([userId, courseId])), `LessonProgress` (id, userId, lessonId, watchPercentage @default(0), isCompleted @default(false), completedAt?, lastWatchedAt @default(now()), @@unique([userId, lessonId])), `Certificate` (id, userId, courseId, issuedAt @default(now()), fileUrl?, @@unique([userId, courseId])).
Executar `npx prisma validate` e corrigir quaisquer erros. Executar `npx prisma format` para formatar o arquivo. Revisar que todos os relacionamentos bidirecionais estão corretos.

technicalNotes: Usar `String` para UUIDs com `@default(uuid())` — não usar `Int` auto-incremento para evitar enumeração de IDs.
Prisma usa `Decimal` para valores monetários — usar `Decimal` para priceMonthly e priceAnnual.
